_note: Non-weekly episodes. The /weekly series is tracked in weekly-index.json; /podcasts merges both at render time. Update this file when a new article companion or special episode lands.

groups.name: Article companions
groups.blurb: One conversation per long-form piece. Rutger walks a guest through the argument.

groups.name: Specials
groups.blurb: Off-format episodes that don't sit next to one article.

episodes.title: The Multiplier Myth — a conversation.
episodes.summary: Rutger and Oracle stress-test the central argument: AI is a multiplier only if you use it on the part of the work that compounds, not as a way to do the same job with fewer people.

episodes.title: The Thirty-Minute Kitchen — with Frits.
episodes.summary: Frits the Nestor pushes back on the title, then agrees with most of the article anyway. The kitchen is the prep line, not the meal.

episodes.title: Agent Inclusive — with Angela.
episodes.summary: Angela the chief of staff, calm and procedural, walks through what "Agent Inclusive" actually means in a real org: keep one human in the room who can write a real brief.

episodes.title: The Evolution of Video Models — with Dino.
episodes.summary: Dino the creative dinosaur reluctantly acknowledges the lineage from Veo 2 to Omni. The article's four-lineage frame survives.

episodes.title: Interactivity Is The New Explanation — a panel.
episodes.summary: Strategy Oracle defends slides. Marie keeps everyone definitionally honest. The article's argument lands with one notable caveat: live demos give up the frozen argument.

episodes.title: How to make a character sheet — a panel.
episodes.summary: Dino objects, Marie corrects, Rutger walks through the three-method tutorial without losing the thread. Reference-conditioning beats prompt-only.

episodes.title: The file on Rutger — a panel, no host.
episodes.summary: Five invented guests go through the press clippings, the bios, and this website while the subject is out of the room — under the running joke that he prompted all of them into existence.
